_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6 inhibition enhances SHP2 inhibitor efficacy and is dependent upon RB function in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors

details: JH-2-031 PDX classified as very sensitive (VS) to TNO155 (SHP2i) in 4-week NRG mouse xenograft study; single-agent TNO155 and TNO155 + ribociclib (CDK4/6i) combination were nearly equivalent at 4 weeks; after drug holiday and rechallenge, combination showed more profound and durable antitumor effect; sustained benefit confirmed with extended 10-week continuous combination therapy and significant Ki-67 reduction by IHC
